description: This file contains SCSS styles for grid layout components, including responsive breakpoints, grid rows, columns, and CSS grid configurations. It uses Sass features like variables, mixins, and control directives to generate CSS for grid-based layouts.
external_files: variables or mixins files that define $grid-breakpoints, $prefix, $enable-grid-classes, $enable-cssgrid, make-row(), make-col-ready(), make-cssgrid(), make-grid-columns()
